itemReviewed.name: Sparsh Global School - C-Block,Jal Vayu Vihar

address.streetAddress: HS-01, Sector -20, Greater Noida, Uttar Pradesh 201305

itemListElement.reviewBody: As a former student, Sparsh Global School is one big headache of scams and rude behavior. As a part of the 1st batch of the school, we received tablets as a gift, which we were told to use to our own will and that it is ours, not the schools. Opon leaving, they demanded that it be returned. If any teacher receives a complaint, the teacher will take out their own personal grudges on your child. Except for a few good teachers, the other teachers are rude and unforgiving. The school also increased the fees more than what is allowed by the govt. and they never provided any prior notice. Their uniforms are tacky and itchy, look cheap and are difficult for a parent to clean, and for the child to wear comfortably. The only good thing about this school is it's infrastructure and the few good teachers. For parents, the school's staff is extremely rude and utterly arrogant. The principal is a unkind lady, Ms. Monika Randhawa, and harasses parents and students likewise. Many things promised at the time of admission were not fulfilled either. If you want for your child to have a peaceful and educational environment, I would highly suggest you look at other schools. This school is a personal hell for many students who genuinely have areas of struggle or want a peaceful school life. They also have many odd rules that no other schools in the area follow, like no going out of the class, staying with the class teachers at all times, lunch only in the canteen, etc. Please save your time and money by looking at other schools!

itemReviewed.name: Sparsh Global School - C-Block,Jal Vayu Vihar

itemListElement.reviewBody: Teacher quality of senior classes is very poor.Basically they are not interested in teaching but they are in school to demotivate,demoralise and humiliate our kids.

itemReviewed.name: Sparsh Global School - C-Block,Jal Vayu Vihar
Sparsh Global School - C-Block,Jal Vayu Vihar

itemListElement.reviewBody:
Yes They are frauder  don't trust them ...last year, my childrens got admission here. We were assured that they would not hike the fees for at least 2 years. But this year, they hiked without any prior notice, and that too in mid of April when we already purchased books and dresses. Now, they are not giving TC of my children and asking for may and
June fees and also the tab was given by them to the pilot batch of students as gift but now they are asking to return it back to them .This is not right for an educational institution. They are mentally harassing me and my children. Now, I am not able to get admission in any school without Tc.
They are fraudster and cheaters what I found...

itemReviewed.name: Sparsh Global School - C-Block,Jal Vayu Vihar

itemListElement.reviewBody: If your school is not running then you can ask for donation...but you people are blackmailing the parents and asking for money for TC...this is absolutely wrong... shameless ... worst school ever

itemReviewed.name: Sparsh Global School - C-Block,Jal Vayu Vihar

itemListElement.reviewBody: Sparsh Global School has been a blessing for our family. Choosing this school for our child was one of the best decisions we've made. Our child has grown both academically and socially. The teachers go above and beyond, and the infrastructure is impressive. The caring teachers, nurturing environment, and dedicated principal make this school exceptional. Our child loves going to school every day!!

itemListElement.reviewBody: The attending staff was not professional are was misinformed about the fee policies and course. Had to change my mind after the  miserable encounter.
